testFuzz_challengeFirst_succeeds(uint256.notice: Tests that challenging the a divergence in a large preimage proposal at the first leaf always succeeds.

testFuzz_challenge_arbitraryLocation_suc.notice: Tests that challenging the first divergence in a large preimage proposal at an arbitrary location         in the leaf values always succeeds.

testFuzz_squeezeLPP_succeeds(uint256,uin.notice: Tests that squeezing a large preimage proposal after the challenge period has passed always succeeds and         persists the correct data.

test_addLeaves_mismatchedSize_succeeds().notice: Tests that `addLeavesLPP` sets the proposal as countered when `_finalize = true` and the number of         bytes processed is less than the claimed size.

test_addLeaves_multipleParts_succeeds().notice: Tests that leaves can be added the large preimage proposal mapping and proven to be contained within         the computed merkle root.

test_addLeaves_notContiguous_reverts().notice: Tests that the `addLeavesLPP` function reverts when the starting block index is not what is expected.

test_addLeaves_notEOA_reverts().notice: Tests that the `addLeavesLPP` function may never be called when `tx.origin != msg.sender`

test_addLeaves_notInitialized_reverts().notice: Tests that leaves cannot be added until the large preimage proposal has been initialized.

test_challengeFirst_invalidCommitment_su.notice: Tests that an invalid leaf can be countered with the `challengeFirst` function.

test_challengeFirst_statesNotContiguous_.notice: Tests that an invalid leaf cannot be countered with `challengeFirst` if it is not the first leaf.

test_challengeFirst_validCommitment_reve.notice: Tests that a valid leaf cannot be countered with the `challengeFirst` function.

test_challenge_invalidCommitment_succeed.notice: Tests that an invalid leaf can be countered with the `challenge` function in the middle of the tree.

test_challenge_invalidPreimage_reverts().notice: Tests that an invalid leaf can not be countered with an incorrect prestate matrix reveal.

test_challenge_statesNotContiguous_rever.notice: Tests that an invalid leaf can not be countered with non-contiguous states.

test_challenge_validCommitment_reverts().notice: Tests that a valid leaf cannot be countered with the `challenge` function in the middle of the tree.

test_initLPP_alreadyInitialized_reverts(.notice: Tests that the `initLPP` function reverts if the proposal has already been initialized.

test_initLPP_partOffsetOOB_reverts().notice: Tests that the `initLPP` function reverts when the part offset is out of bounds of the full preimage.

test_initLPP_sizeTooSmall_reverts().notice: Tests that the `initLPP` function reverts when the part offset is out of bounds of the full preimage.

test_squeeze_challengePeriodActive_rever.notice: Tests that a proposal cannot be finalized until it has passed the challenge period.

test_squeeze_challengePeriodPassed_succe.notice: Tests that leaves can be added the large preimage proposal mapping and finalized to be added to the         authorized mappings.

test_squeeze_incompleteAbsorbtion_revert.notice: Tests that a proposal cannot be finalized until it has passed the challenge period.

test_squeeze_invalidPreimage_reverts().notice: Tests that the `squeeze` function reverts when the post state passed

test_squeeze_notFinalized_reverts().notice: Tests that a proposal cannot be squeezed if the proposal has not been finalized.

test_squeeze_proposalChallenged_reverts(.notice: Tests that a proposal cannot be finalized until it has passed the challenge period.

test_squeeze_statesNotContiguous_reverts.notice: Tests that the `squeeze` function reverts when the passed states are not contiguous.

FfiFailed(string).notice: Error for when an ffi command fails.

documentation.text: @notice Sets up the testing suite.

@notice Tests that the challenge period cannot be made too large.
 @param _challengePeriod The challenge period to test.
@notice Test the pre-image key computation with a known pre-image.
@notice Tests that context-specific data [0, 24] bytes in length can be loaded correctly.

@notice Tests that multiple local key contexts can be used by the same address for the
         same local data identifier.
@notice Tests that context-specific data [0, 32] bytes in length can be loaded correctly.
@notice Tests that a pre-image is correctly set.
@notice Tests that adding a global keccak256 pre-image at the part boundary reverts.
@notice Tests that a pre-image cannot be set with an out-of-bounds offset.
@notice Tests that a pre-image cannot be set with an out-of-bounds offset.
@notice Reading a pre-image part that has not been set should revert.
@notice Tests that a precompile pre-image result is correctly set.
@notice Tests that a precompile pre-image result is correctly set at its return data offset.
@notice Tests that a failed precompile call has a zero status byte in preimage
@notice Tests that adding a global precompile result at the part boundary reverts.
@notice Tests that a global precompile result cannot be set with an out-of-bounds offset.
@notice Tests that a global precompile load succeeds on a variety of gas inputs.
@notice Tests that a global precompile load succeeds on insufficient gas.
@notice Sets up the testing suite.
@notice Tests that the `initLPP` function reverts when the part offset is out of bounds of the full preimage.
@notice Tests that the `initLPP` function reverts when the part offset is out of bounds of the full preimage.
@notice Tests that the `initLPP` function reverts if the proposal has already been initialized.
